collection.providerInterface: GitHub REST API through explicit GitHub CLI GET requests
collection.mutationGuard: GET-only; auto-remediation and provider writes are rejected before collection

results.observedValue: main retains pull-request protection with zero required approving reviews, no bypass allowances, and the existing strict seven-check rule.
results.diagnostic: The sole-maintainer exception makes the protected branch usable without allowing a direct push, force push, or deletion.

results.observedValue: Each isolated release environment requires github:furkanmamuk, allows that reviewer to approve the reviewer-created job, and denies administrator bypass.
results.diagnostic: The observed self-review setting is a deliberate sole-maintainer exception; target isolation and protected-branch restriction remain in force.
